description_long: This is a modern, dark gray upholstered couch with a boxy, geometric silhouette and clean lines. The couch features two large seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both of which appear plush and slightly textured. Two additional loose throw pillows are placed at each end, enhancing comfort and visual symmetry. The armrests are straight, wide, and at the same height as the backrest, contributing to a contemporary look. The legs are short, blocky, and made of dark wood, providing sturdy support while remaining visually unobtrusive. The upholstery has a subtle woven texture, giving the surface a matte, soft appearance.
description: A modern, dark gray fabric couch with straight armrests, plush seat and back cushions, and short block legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat cushions, two backrest cushions, and two throw pillows with straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the straight, boxy armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the subtle texture of the upholstery, with both armrests visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest, cushion depth, and throw pillow placement.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large seat cushions and two large backrest cushions, both loose and plush, with two additional loose throw pillows at each end.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid dark gray fabric with a subtle woven texture and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs made of dark wood, exposed and positioned at each corner.
attribute_armrest_design: Straight, wide, and boxy armrests at the same height as the backrest, fully upholstered in matching fabric.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, and continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions for support.
